emails.subject: FW: FW: March 2001 Invoice
emails.body: Mary Do you pay Spinnaker, for gas purchases? (See Daren's question below, re: 03/01 purchase price from Spinnaker (#144271 144264), Need to know if price is at IF or Gas Daily? Thanks, Tess

emails.subject: Re: FW: FW: March 2001 Invoice
emails.body: Re: FW: FW: March 2001 Invoice The question is not that "cut and dry". However, for the month of March Enron paid Spinnaker IF HSC -$0.085. Currently the volume is posted under deal ticket #144271 with is the deal tick for gas daily production. This production should be moved to Deal ticket #144264 with is the IF.

emails.subject: RE: FW: FW: March 2001 Invoice
emails.body: RE: FW: FW: March 2001 Invoice Thanks Mary! Daren, is the info that you need?
